ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is denominated */,
  "par_amount" TEXT /* The par amount of the instrument */,
  "coupon" TEXT /* Coupon rate of the instrument */,
  "interest_start_day" INTEGER /* Day of the year when interest starts accruing */,
  "maturity" INTEGER /* Maturity date of the instrument */,
  "average_cost" TEXT /* Average cost associated with the instrument */,
  "amortized_price" TEXT /* Amortized price of the instrument */,
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issuer of the instrument */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was issued */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the instrument */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instrument's data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the instrument (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_issuer_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuer_id") REFERENCES issuers ("issuer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currency_data ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_calculations" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest calculation record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "accrued_interest" TEXT /* Amount of interest accrued on the instrument */,
  "amortized_value" TEXT /* Amortized value of the instrument */,
  "pl_amortized_value" TEXT /* Profit/Loss associated with amortized value */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest calculation was performed */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Current interest rate used in the calculation */,
  "local_currency" TEXT /* Local currency for the interest calculation */,
  "local_accrued_interest" TEXT /* Accrued interest in the local currency */,
  "foreign_currency" TEXT /* Foreign currency for the interest calculation */,
  "foreign_accrued_interest" TEXT /* Accrued interest in the foreign currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_calculations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_data" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code representing the currency (e.g. USD, HKD) */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange rate */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency for the exchange rate (e.g., USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_management" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_management_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Price at which the instrument was purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio_management ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fund manager, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio associated with the risk */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk factors */,
  "risk_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk assessment was performed */,
  "mitigation_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy to mitigate the identified risk */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the risk record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio_management ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio which executed the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_amount" TEXT /* Amount involved in the trade */,
  "trade_price" TEXT /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker who executed the trade */,
  "trade_fee" TEXT /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trade record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio_management ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date when the fund was established */,
  "total_aum" TEXT /* Total Assets Under Management (AUM) for the fund */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of the fund (e.g., equity, bond) */,
  "benchmark" TEXT /* Benchmark index for the fund */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the fund record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion record */,
  "from_currency" TEXT /* Currency being converted from */,
  "to_currency" TEXT /* Currency being converted to */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate from the source currency to the target currency */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion rate was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the conversion rate record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issuers" (
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issuer */,
  "issuer_name" TEXT /* Name of the issuer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the issuer is based */,
  "rating_agency" TEXT /* Rating agency that assigns credit ratings to the issuer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the issuer record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issuer_id")
)
